Unlock Return Update Sheet

Enter the dashboard password to update the shared debt/cash return or edit, clear, and paste the stock return sheet for this session.

Google Sheets Sync

Paste a normal Google Sheets share link or a direct CSV export link. Keep the first two columns as Stock Name and Daily Return (%).

✅ Sheet linked  …T3BH1EvWwW9mE/edit?usp=sharing

Synced 823 stock returns from Google Sheets on 02 Apr 2026, 12:52 pm. Auto-sync runs every 1 minute.

If the dashboard is opened directly as a local .html file, use the normal Google Sheets share link with Anyone with the link set to Viewer. If it still fails, open the dashboard through a small local server.

Common Debt/Cash Return

Update the daily debt/cash return once here. The same rate is applied to every fund.

Editable Stock Return Sheet

Each line is prefilled as Stock Name<tab>Daily Return (%). Replace the returns, paste a fresh list from Excel, or copy the current list out for editing.

Clear Sheet only empties this editor. Live stock returns change only after you apply a new sheet.
